Scan The Merch

Choose your OdotNYC item, open the scanner, and point your phone at the design. Each product unlocks its own interactive AR-style collectible moment.

Start Scan

Select Your Item

OdotNYC Tote Bag

Scan the tote design to reveal a digital collector card and product story.

OdotNYC Sticker

Scan the sticker design to unlock a pop-up badge and interactive AR drop.

📷

Camera Preview

Tap Open Camera, then point at the selected merch design.
Use Demo Scan to preview the AR effect.

Developer note: this file includes the complete front-end experience. For true image recognition, connect the scan area to MindAR, AR.js NFT markers, Zappar, 8th Wall, or a custom TensorFlow.js model trained on your tote and sticker artwork.

How It Works

1. Choose

User selects Tote Bag or Sticker before scanning.

2. Scan

The phone camera opens and the design is placed inside the scan frame.

3. Unlock

An OdotNYC digital collectible, story, or product interaction appears.

OdotNYC • Merch merged with technology • Built for collectors
🗽

The OdotNYC Story

OdotNYC merch is more than a design. Each piece is merged with technology, turning stickers and apparel into interactive collector items that can unlock stories, digital art, games, and future AR drops.
